bead.title: ui-tenant-database-picker: two-level selector + route prefixing
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] stores.svelte.ts gains selectedDatabase state + getters/setters
- [ ] api.ts request() uses scope-based URL building, removes X-Axon-Database header
- [ ] Every api.ts export migrated from dbName to scope
- [ ] fetchTenantDatabases function + TenantDatabase type added
- [ ] DatabaseSelector.svelte component renders in the layout header
- [ ] All route pages (schemas, audit, collections, collections/[name]) updated
- [ ] grep -rn X-Axon-Database ui/ returns zero lines
- [ ] bun run check (svelte-check) passes
- [ ] bun test passes
- [ ] Manual dev server startup works (if testable in worktree)
